title: Fix ERD Toolbar Icon Wrapping by Adjusting Column Width
story: As a DataTools Pro user on the ERD page, I want the toolbar icons to not wrap to a second line, so that the interface looks clean and professional.
description: The ERD page toolbar icons are wrapping to a second line due to insufficient column width. The fix is changing the column class from `col-md-5` to `col-md-7` to give the icons enough horizontal space.
acceptance_criteria: ERD toolbar icons display on a single line without wrapping
Column width is sufficient for all toolbar icons
No layout regression on other elements in the row
ux_changes: Increased ERD toolbar column width from col-md-5 to col-md-7 to prevent icon wrapping.
implementation_notes: Simple Bootstrap grid class change from col-md-5 to col-md-7 on the toolbar icon container.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and submitted for review.
